variables.notes: No explicit operating depreciation/amortisation row related to COGS/cost of revenues appears in the excerpt above the financial section. Therefore D&A is assumed embedded in the selected parent row 'Cost of revenues/COGS', so nothing should be added separately.

No explicit operating depreciation/amortisation row related to SG&A/overhead/admin/marketing/R&D appears in the excerpt above the financial section. Therefore D&A is assumed embedded in the selected parent row 'Selling/General/Admin Expense', so nothing should be added separately.
